problem_spec.summary: Determine the guilty suspect in a four-person symbolic logic puzzle with exactly one all-lies speaker, exactly one guilty suspect, and statement formulas built from implication, Boolean connectives, and, in some instances, references to the truth values of other statements.
givens: At 21:10 the Cerulean Scepter vanished from a sealed pedestal.
Exactly one suspect lies in every statement they utter; the other three speak only truths.
$Lx$: x lies in all statements. $Tx$: x is entirely truthful.
$Gx$: x is guilty. $Px$: x was present at 21:10. $\oplus$: exclusive-or.
ask: Who stole the Cerulean Scepter? Return a single digit (1–4).

parameter(s).name: statement_count_per_suspect
parameter(s).purpose: records the logical branching width for each suspect

parameter(s).name: liar_culprit_coupling
parameter(s).purpose: records whether the liar and culprit are forced to be different individuals

invariant(s).name: unique_liar
invariant(s).statement: Exactly one suspect lies in every statement; the remaining suspects are truthful in every statement.

essential_assumption(s): Each suspect is either wholly truthful or wholly dishonest across all of their statements.
uniqueness_certificate(s): Finite case analysis over the possible liar identities leaves exactly one admissible culprit label.

technique(s).name: world_consistency_elimination
technique(s).purpose: discard assignments that violate the all-truth or all-lies rules

theorem(s).name: classical_propositional_semantics
theorem(s).role: determines the truth of every symbolic statement under a candidate world assignment

closest_first_principle_concept_applied: A finite logical world model can be checked exhaustively for consistency.

critical_trick(s): Treat each candidate liar as a full world hypothesis and reject any hypothesis that makes one of the other suspects partially false.

library(s).name: itertools
library(s).reason: enumerate candidate liar, culprit, and presence assignments exactly

task(s).name: symbolic_world_search
task(s).reason: verify the unique culprit by exhaustive search over the finite truth assignment space
